_comment: Wave 1 followup — capture the plain wp-admin Dashboard so navWPFormsSidebarMenu can start from a real WP dashboard instead of admin-forms-overview. `keepSidebar: true` overrides the capture default (which only keeps the sidebar for slugs starting with `admin-`). The WPForms top-level sidebar item is present but its submenu is collapsed by default — it expands on :hover or when the WPForms admin area is current.
